source.verified_public_api: handle_request(add_prompt) accepts text, bounding_boxes, and bounding_box_labels; SAM 3.1 multiplex consumes normalized xmin/ymin/width/height boxes and positive/negative labels

implemented_contract.supported_exemplar: A positive or negative box on the exact target image, passed with each governed text concept through the official SAM 3.1 multiplex API.
implemented_contract.manifest_binding: Closed JSON binds source-image file SHA-256, decoded RGB SHA-256, source dimensions, absolute xyxy geometry, polarity, authority, and canonical document SHA-256.
implemented_contract.request_binding: The runtime revalidates the manifest against the target image and adds manifest document and file hashes to the closed subprocess request.
implemented_contract.translation: Absolute xyxy is deterministically translated to normalized xmin/ymin/width/height; positive becomes label 1 and negative becomes label 0.
implemented_contract.duplicate_behavior: Duplicate manifest identities fail closed on both host and isolated-runner boundaries.
implemented_contract.cross_image_boundary: Raw images, arbitrary external exemplar images, and manifests bound to a different target image fail closed; the public multiplex API does not expose a second-image exemplar input.
implemented_contract.authority: Visual prompts produce draft candidates only and confer no production-mask, active-map, semantic-truth, certification, or gold authority.

verification.runtime_matrix: PASS: 8 providers, 6 qualified, 2 explicit pending, 18 artifacts

runtime_boundary.reason: Ubuntu-22.04 root ext4 remains emergency_ro; live checkpoint evidence is pending guarded offline VHD recovery by an administrator.
